title: AI Fiction Quality Benchmark
claim_boundary: Deterministic local writing-quality benchmark for short fiction outputs; not a public Kaggle leaderboard claim until packaged and externally run.

prompt_adherence.purpose: The response follows the prompt, required terms, length, and stated scene objective.

story_coherence.purpose: The scene has cause, effect, readable progression, and no random unexplained turns.

character_continuity.purpose: Named characters remain present, motivated, and consistent across the passage.

scene_grounding.purpose: The prose anchors the reader in place, objects, sensory detail, and action.

prose_naturalness.purpose: The writing avoids generic AI cadence, stale phrasing, bloated abstraction, and phrase repetition.

rhythm_and_sound_control.purpose: Alliteration, sentence length, and sound patterning create pressure or relief without becoming ornamental noise.

thought_track_composition.purpose: Music-theory inspired sheet-music layer: emotional, sensory, action, memory, and decision tracks should form a readable chord progression across the passage.

specificity_vs_ai_weirdness.purpose: Concrete language beats vague surreal filler, mixed metaphors, and unexplained atmospheric drift.

null_space_structure.purpose: Bible/null-space inspired absence check: durable scenes need some combination of commitment, witness, boundary, pause/audit, and invitation/choice structure.

emotional_progression.purpose: The scene creates a before-and-after emotional movement instead of staying flat.

ending_or_transition.purpose: The passage lands on a decision, image, reversal, or transition that can carry the next scene.

kaggle_shape.task: Given a prompt and model response, predict a 0-100 fiction-quality score and dimension notes.
kaggle_shape.public_metric: mean_absolute_error against human or committee scores once a labeled set exists
kaggle_shape.local_metric: deterministic heuristic score used as a bootstrap judge before human labels

course_signal.lesson_unit: Each graded row can become a course example with feedback, revision target, and before/after response.
course_signal.promotion_rule: Do not train on generated fiction blindly; train on judged revisions with dimension evidence and frozen holdout prompts.
